chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-91 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on M.A. No.1521/2016. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2021 Mr. Sahid Khan Panhwar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. == Case of the petitioner is that she passed NTS test and stood at serial No.11 at the final merit list holding education of MSc and PTC course applied for the post of Primary School Teacher; however, despite having been successful in all aspects, her case was rejected on account of belated domicile certificate. Counsel contends that petitioner got married in the year 2010, where after she moved to the subject District and she applied for domicile certificate; however, the certificate was issued after a considerable delay by the said office. Be that as it may, the respondents have admitted to the fact that case of the petitioner stands good at the merit list as she secured second position and is eligible for the consideration. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh also concedes that case of the petitioner be forwarded to the District Recruitment Committee to pass a considerate order in the given circumstances. In view of above present petition is disposed of with directions to DRC to sympathetically to consider the case of the petitioner and pass an order after hearing the petitioner without thirty days after receipt of this Order. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
